sql_array: CREATE TABLE seq_test (id bigint, seq_value bigint);
INSERT INTO seq_test (id, seq_value) VALUES (1, get_value_for('dwh2', 'seq_9201'));
UPDATE seq_test SET seq_value = get_value_for('dwh2', 'seq_9201') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, seq_value FROM seq_test WHERE seq_value > 100;
DELETE FROM seq_test WHERE id = 1 AND seq_value = get_value_for('dwh2', 'seq_9201');
